text.title: Brand Positioning Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when in doubt about which variant to apply.

decision-tree.root-question: Do all Applies-If preconditions hold and no Skip-If trigger fires?

conclusion.verdict: do not run this methodology; document skip rationale
narrow to buying authority + trigger + firmographic
add 'do nothing' + internal tools to alternatives
pick ONE 'only we'; demote rest to support
run >= 10 customer interviews before public launch

text.example: preconditions=true → readiness gates evaluated → all_checks_pass==true → conclusion ref=validate-with-customer-interviews
